query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionAuditLog` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `previousTierId` int,
  `newTierId` int NOT NULL,
  `changedBy` int,
  `reason` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`previousTierId`) REFERENCES `subscriptionTiers`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`newTierId`) REFERENCES `subscriptionTiers`(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionAuditLog` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `previousTierId` int,
  `newTierId` int NOT NULL,
  `changedBy` int,
  `reason` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`previousTierId`) REFERENCES `subscriptionTiers`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`newTierId`) REFERENCES `subscriptionTiers`(`id`)
);
